name: pr_cep_expjoin_order_postadv
drl: rule R when $a : A($ak : k) $b : B(k == $ak, this after[0ms,1000ms] $a) then end
_finding: The fourth cell of the round-21 2x2: B, advance(2000), then the ANCHOR arrives already past its own deadline (ts 0, expires 1000, clock 2000 - born-expired). The join FIRES in both engines: the arriving anchor's join evaluation precedes its expiry drain. Completes the certified table: both-inserted-before-advance fires regardless of order; this-event-after-advance is silent (the anchor was already drained); anchor-after-advance fires (arrival evaluation precedes the drain).
